title: Graceful Degradation Patterns
content: When a downstream service is unavailable: 1) Search: serve cached results with stale badge. 2) Reviews: show product without reviews section. 3) Recommendations: hide section entirely. 4) Inventory: show In Stock for items with recent positive stock count, queue recheck. 5) Images: serve lower-resolution cached version. Each degradation has max TTL before showing explicit error.
